rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the inductive claim contradicts the per-node embedding).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (evaluation protocol mislabeled).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (mislabeled evaluation protocol).
